articles.title: TRANSFORM YOUR PHOTOS INTO VIDEOS AND REMIX YOUR PICS IN GOOGLE PHOTOS
articles.summary: Google Photos announced new creative tools that transform static images into six-second videos and artistic remixes using AI technology. The photo-to-video feature, powered by Veo 2, rolls out today, while Remix transforms pictures into anime and comic styles. A new Create tab, arriving in August, will centralize all creative features, including safety measures such as digital watermarks.

articles.title: BUILD WITH YOUR TEAM, NOT AROUND THEM: REAL-TIME COLLABORATION IN WEBFLOW IS HERE
articles.summary: Webflow has launched real-time collaboration in private beta, enabling entire website teams, including designers, developers, and marketers to work simultaneously on the same page without handoffs or delays. This feature streamlines workflows, reduces bottlenecks, and enables faster, more integrated project delivery, with updates syncing instantly and providing visibility into who is working on what.

articles.title: META'S NEURAL INTERFACE WRISTBAND READS YOUR MUSCLE SIGNALS TO CONTROL COMPUTERS
articles.summary: Meta has developed a neural interface wristband that utilizes surface electromyography to detect electrical signals from muscle movements, enabling users to control computers without physical contact. This breakthrough challenges traditional wearable design by eliminating setup friction, enhancing accessibility, and introducing new interaction models that could influence the future of AR, computing, and health tech.

articles.title: PROTECT YOUR CREATIVITY FROM IDEA KILLERS
articles.summary: "Idea killers" are statements that prevent organizational change despite often containing poor logic. Common examples include "we tried that before" and "we don't do that here," typically said by those in positions of power. The solution involves preparing counterarguments and asking questions to examine the value of ideas rather than allowing dismissive statements.

articles.title: A HOLISTIC FRAMEWORK FOR SHARED DESIGN LEADERSHIP
HOW TO SELL THE EUROPEAN ACCESSIBILITY ACT TO YOUR BOSS
articles.summary: As of June 28, the European Accessibility Act (EAA) made it legally mandatory for businesses selling in the EU to meet accessibility standards—or risk hefty fines from multiple member states. Beyond legal compliance, accessibility improves user experience, expands your potential customer base, and enhances product quality for everyone, making it a smart business decision, not just a moral one.

articles.title: VISUALLY EDIT WEBSITES
articles.summary: TurboStyle helps you effortlessly adjust styles, update text, swap visuals, and explore design ideas right inside your browser.

articles.title: WORKING APPS IN SECONDS
articles.summary: Blink is an AI coding agent that helps you build websites, web apps, and mobile applications.

articles.title: DISCOVER WHICH AI IS THE BEST AT DESIGN
articles.summary: Design Arena enables the evaluation of AI design capabilities through direct comparisons. Community preferences shape the rankings. All voting data is public and verifiable.

articles.title: THE PRODUCT TRIAD: DESIGN'S ROLE
articles.summary: The product triad organizes Agile product teams with one representative each from design, product management, and engineering working as equal partners. Based on IDEO's Desirable-Viable-Feasible framework, effective triads collaborate across all three aspects rather than maintaining siloed ownership. Designers contribute beyond just desirability by understanding business objectives, conducting user research, and collaborating closely with engineering to ensure feasible implementation.

articles.title: STANDARDS LAUNCHES NEW SITE AND IS QUIETLY BUILDING THE INTERNET'S BRAND BACKBONE
articles.summary: Design software startup Standards has launched a new site showcasing published brand systems from top companies like Cash App, Mailchimp, and The Obama Foundation, marking a major milestone in its journey from a niche archival project to a fast-growing design platform. Born from the success of reissuing iconic style guides, Standards now serves over 1,000 companies, with 300%+ MRR growth—all while remaining fully bootstrapped.

articles.title: FAIRPHONE 6 INTRODUCES MODULAR ADD-ONS AND NEXT-LEVEL REPAIRABILITY
articles.summary: The Fairphone 6 continues the company's mission to challenge disposable tech culture by offering a modular, repairable smartphone with a refined design, user-swappable parts, and solid mid-range performance. With features like a removable battery, upgradeable components, and at least five years of software support, it aims to extend device lifespan and empower users—proving that sustainability and usability can go hand in hand.

articles.title: DISNEY AND NETFLIX ARE QUIETLY USING THE SAME GENERATIVE AI STARTUP – HERE'S WHY THE REST OF HOLLYWOOD IS CIRCLING
articles.summary: Disney and Netflix have both quietly adopted Runway AI's generative tools, with Netflix utilizing them for visual effects sequences in "The Eternaut."

articles.title: I TRIED ADOBE'S FANTASY PREMIER LEAGUE LOGO GENERATOR, AND THE RESULTS ARE WORSE THAN MY SQUAD'S
articles.summary: Adobe's new Fantasy Premier League logo generator, part of the company's partnership with the English Premier League, proved disappointing, appearing to be just a generic Adobe Express template with Premier League branding.
